# Getting Started

[Home](Home) | [Modules](Modules) | [API](API) | [Examples](Examples) | [Reference Games](Reference-Games) | [Lunasome](Lunasome)

This page leads from an empty game folder to the rest of the wiki.

## Game Folder

- `main.lua` - main game script and optional `lurek.*` callbacks.
- `conf.lua` - optional window and runtime configuration.
- `assets/` - images, sounds, fonts, and game data.

## First Pages

- [First Game](First-Game)
- [Callbacks](Callbacks)

## Run An Example

```bash
cargo run -- content/examples/render.lua
cargo run -- content/games/showcase/hello_world
```
